author: potuz
content: It's effectively impossible to do this, at least not that way

author: potuz
content: If we are going to implement a vote like this we need to do it at the duty time level, the VC requests for PTC attestations to sign and it may get many different ones for different keys

author: potuz
content: So the beacon must track on each slot all blocks it's seen

author: potuz
content: And for a given slot when the VC asks it should send a list of expected Payloads, payload statuses and validator IDs that need to sign

author: potuz
content: Otherwise effectively any non finalized root is a possible dependent root
